title: Advisory on Unauthorized "Suchitra's Double Trouble League"
indian_angle: This advisory directly impacts the organization and legitimacy of domestic badminton leagues in India.
summary: The Badminton Association of India (BAI) has issued an advisory regarding an unauthorized league, "Suchitra’s Double Trouble League", to inform players and officials.

title: Dates Changed for Two Ranking Tournaments
indian_angle: Indian players participating in domestic ranking tournaments need to be aware of these schedule changes.
summary: The Badminton Association of India (BAI) has announced a change of dates for two upcoming domestic ranking tournaments.

title: Expression of Interest for Professional Badminton League
indian_angle: This signifies a potential new professional league in India, offering more opportunities for Indian players.
summary: The Badminton Association of India (BAI) has invited Expressions of Interest for the establishment of a Professional Badminton League.

title: Thomas Cup Squad Reassembles for Asian Games; Treesa-Gayatri Return
indian_angle: The reassembly of the successful Thomas Cup squad, with key players returning, is crucial for India's medal hopes at the Asian Games.
summary: India's Thomas Cup winning squad is reassembling for preparations for the Asian Games, with the return of Treesa Jolly and Gayatri Gopichand.

title: Indian Badminton Team Finalized for Asian Games 2026
indian_angle: The finalization of the team determines which Indian athletes will represent the nation at the prestigious Asian Games.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has announced the finalized team for the 20th Asian Games 2026, confirming India's representatives.
